prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Insulin Glargine 15units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.3 kg; Height 166.9 cm; BMI 25.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 9.4%; 6 months ago 9.6%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 9.9%), FPG (12 months ago 201mg/dL; 9 months ago 259mg/dL; 6 months ago 272mg/dL; 3 months ago 236mg/dL; current 247mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 72.9kg; 9 months ago 71.7kg; 6 months ago 69.1kg; 3 months ago 70.8kg; current 71.3kg), Height (12 months ago 166.9cm; 9 months ago 166.9cm; 6 months ago 166.9cm; 3 months ago 166.9cm; current 166.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 25.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 139mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 39U/L; 6 months ago 39U/L; 3 months ago 39U/L; current 35U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 127mg/g; 9 months ago 195mg/g; 6 months ago 198mg/g; 3 months ago 158mg/g; current 199mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 184mg/dL; 9 months ago 182mg/dL; 6 months ago 184mg/dL; 3 months ago 180mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.8g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
